[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "best co-op experience"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "best co op game ive played"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the part when Leo and Vincent fought at the end to the death, and the whole time vincent was an undercover cop"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "if you pley it with that one funny homie of yours it mekes it 10 times better"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Addicting"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "frustrating, sometimes a little ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥, but super rewarding when you learn the mechanics"}, {"aspect": "learning_curve", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "super rewarding when you learn the mechanics"}, {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Map feels unnecessarily large at times, like there's missing enemies or towns or something, but it's also kind of nice getting a break from enemies"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "No ultra wide support"}, {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "has keyboard ui despite using controller"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fleshing out such an open map"}, {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "great ost"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "visuals"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "gameplay"}]}
]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Its fun"}]},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gunplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Gunplay is fine"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "content is there"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "technically it’s no longer on life support"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Specialists never really clicked for me"}, {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Matches feel chaotic in a weird way, not the good Battlefield kind"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "No classic Battlefield soul"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Do not buy this game if you don't want to turn on secure boot on your system"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "CSM (one of the things you need to turn on) destroys your performance"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "trying to turn on secure boot has the risk of bricking your entire system"}, {"aspect": "cheating", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it does literally nothing to prevent cheating"}, {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "EA's stupid decisions"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "good but eventually boring"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "very fun building up your tavern and managing the customers and stock levels"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "didn't expand on the very basic setup"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "after 7 hours of playing though the game pretty much just an afk simulator"}, {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "no real interest in playing though a second time"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "very tedious quest system"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "probably still worth the price if its on a discount"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Super simple"}, {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "nice music"}, {"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "really relaxing game"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Simple, relaxing game for building and managing a tavern"}, {"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "relaxing"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very Addicting"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "This game was fun"}, {"aspect": "progression", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "research and quest aspects to be broken"}, {"aspect": "balance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "they wanted a balanced game and it sort of isn't"}, {"aspect": "grind", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it was a grind and not super fun to get there"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "little to do"}, {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "everything can snap into place"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "This game is cute"}]}
]
